# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [0.1.3] - 2026-07-09

### Bug Fixes

- Publish PyPI wheels in lockstep with the crate version ([#23](https://github.com/fg-labs/spoars/pull/23))

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

## [0.1.2] - 2026-07-09

### Features

- Add Graph::subgraph and update_alignment for windowed POA ([#18](https://github.com/fg-labs/spoars/pull/18))
- Expose consensus coverage/composition summaries ([#19](https://github.com/fg-labs/spoars/pull/19))
- Optional serde serialization of the POA graph ([#20](https://github.com/fg-labs/spoars/pull/20))
- Read-only graph-inspection accessors on Poa ([#22](https://github.com/fg-labs/spoars/pull/22))

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

## [0.1.1] - 2026-07-07

### Features

- Opt-in adaptive-banded alignment mode (abPOA-style) ([#17](https://github.com/fg-labs/spoars/pull/17))

### Performance

- Skip the SIMD destripe by reading striped DP matrices in the backtrack ([#11](https://github.com/fg-labs/spoars/pull/11))

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

## [0.1.0] - 2026-07-05

### Documentation

- Mark AVX2 hardware-validated and drop vestigial dead_code allows
- Add crate docs, README, and AlignmentEngine extension guide
- Add profile_align example harness for engine A/B benchmarking
- Correct stale scaffolding markers now that the engine is complete
- Add spoa attribution and README badges

### Features

- Add arena-based POA graph types
- Implement Graph::add_alignment
- Implement topological sort
- Implement heaviest-bundle consensus
- Implement MSA generation
- Implement GFA and DOT output
- Add alignment engine scaffolding and scoring
- Implement scalar linear-gap alignment
- Implement scalar affine-gap alignment
- Implement scalar convex-gap alignment
- Add spoars CLI with spoa-compatible output
- Add SIMD module skeleton and relax crate unsafe lint to deny
- Add Simd per-ISA trait with scalar reference impl
- Add SIMD int16/int32 escalation and ISA dispatch skeleton
- Add SIMD profile build, destripe, and mask/penalty setup
- Implement SSE4.1 Simd trait (int16 + int32)
- Implement SSE4.1 linear-gap SIMD fill (NW)
- SSE4.1 linear SW and OV alignment types
- Implement SSE4.1 affine-gap SIMD fill (NW)
- SSE4.1 affine SW and OV alignment types
- Implement SSE4.1 convex-gap SIMD fill (NW)
- SSE4.1 convex SW and OV alignment types
- Complete SSE4.1 SIMD engine (int32 path + full parity sweep)
- Implement NEON Simd trait (int16 + int32)
- Implement AVX2 Simd trait (int16 + int32)
- Route CLI through the dispatching SIMD engine
- Add SPOARS_FORCE_ISA=sse41 downgrade hook for A/B profiling
- Add public read-only Graph accessors for downstream inspection

### Miscellaneous Tasks

- Scaffold spoars crate and pin spoa submodule at 167bdcc
- Add fg-labs repo hygiene and tooling

### Performance

- Inline SIMD kernels via per-ISA target_feature wrappers
- Reuse SIMD DP buffers across align calls
- Reuse striped SIMD buffers and cache masks/penalties across align calls
- Force-inline destripe_interior into the target_feature kernel
- De-stripe via vectorized widen-and-store instead of scalar scatter

### Refactor

- Extract shared backtrack match-step helper
- Extract scalar backtrack into shared buffer-based functions

### Testing

- Add C++ differential oracle linking spoa submodule
- Add subprocess oracle harness and input generators
- Add proptest differential net and close graph parity gaps
